meaning: n.七十岁老者adj.七十岁(之人),七十至八十岁(之人)的
examples: Not infrequently does the septuagenarian go abroad.
Not infrequently does the septuagenarian walk over distance to Daming Lake Park.
SHORT, septuagenarian and bespectacled, Warren Buffett does not resemble a typical superhero.
But the texture of Theresa's improbable flirtation with this septuagenarian rake is depressingly innocent.
This issue also features a profile of Brazil's high-energy septuagenarian billionaire retailer Abilio Diniz--his company is No. 701.
